changeSet.author: MARKETING
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE user_config ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id BIGINT NOT NULL, config_type VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, config_json TEXT NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), CONSTRAINT fk_user_config_user FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES USERS(ID), CONSTRAINT uq_user_config_type UNIQUE (user_id, config_type) ); CREATE INDEX idx_user_config_user_id ON user_config(user_id);
